# Code of Conduct

This project adopts the [Contributor Covenant v2.1](https://www.contributor-covenant.org/version/2/1/code_of_conduct/).

By participating in this project, you agree to abide by its terms.

## Reporting

If you experience or witness unacceptable behavior, please open a
[GitHub Issue](https://github.com/vincentchalamon/bike-trip-planner/issues/new?labels=conduct&title=%5BConduct%5D+Brief+description).

All reports will be reviewed and handled with discretion.
